title: The Famous Names in the Latest Release of Epstein Files
title_cn: 爱泼斯坦文件最新公布中的名人名单

paragraphs.cn: 美国东部时间2026年1月31日下午3:48更新

paragraphs.en: The Justice Department released what it says is its final trove of files related to the late Jeffrey Epstein, including emails between Epstein and Elon Musk and Bill Gates. Here are some takeaways on what we know so far.
paragraphs.cn: 司法部公布了其声称是与已故杰弗里·爱泼斯坦相关的最后一批文件，其中包括爱泼斯坦与埃隆·马斯克和比尔·盖茨之间的电子邮件。以下是我们目前所知的一些要点。

paragraphs.en: One collection of newly released images shows Hollywood filmmaker Brett Ratner in a series of photos in Epstein’s New York townhouse, sitting with Epstein and women who have been redacted as well as Jean-Luc Brunel, a modeling agent who died in 2022 in prison awaiting trial on sex-trafficking charges.
paragraphs.cn: 一批新公布的图片显示好莱坞电影制作人布雷特·拉特纳在爱泼斯坦的纽约联排别墅中拍摄的一系列照片，他与爱泼斯坦和已被编辑掉的女性以及让-吕克·布鲁内尔坐在一起，布鲁内尔是一名模特经纪人，于2022年在狱中等待性贩卖指控的审判时死亡。

paragraphs.en:
Continue reading your article with
a WSJ subscription
paragraphs.cn: 订阅《华尔街日报》以继续阅读您的文章

vocabulary.meaning_en: Allow or enable to escape from confinement; set free. (In this context: make available to the public)
vocabulary.example: The Famous Names in the Latest Release of Epstein Files.
vocabulary.example_cn: 爱泼斯坦文件最新公布中的名人名单。
